name: Rich Expresso Brownie Bars
recipeInstructions:
BROWNIE:
1. Melt chocolate squares and shortening over hot water, then cool.
2. Beat the eggs, egg yolk, and sugar on high speed of an electric mixer for 5 minutes.
3. Fold in the melted chocolate mixture and remaining ingredients into the batter.
4. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 13 x 9 inch pan and chill for 30 minutes.
CREAM CHEESE TOPPING:
1. Combine cream cheese, icing sugar, instant coffee, liqueur, whole egg, and egg white in an electric mixer.
2. Beat on low speed until well blended.
3. Spread the mixture over the batter in the pan.
4. Melt chocolate square inch and oil, then cool to room temperature.
5. Pipe chocolate lines 1/2 inch apart horizontally down the length of the pan using a toothpick.
6. Draw vertical lines at 1/2 inch intervals from the bottom corner of the pan.
7. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes or until the cream cheese mixture is set. Cool and cut into bars or squares. Store any leftovers in the refrigerator.
MAKES: APPROXIMATELY 32 BARS
